sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Garmin inReach Messenger - Garmin bets on compact satellite texting for US backcountry travelers
feed.summary: Garmin has introduced the inReach Messenger, a compact satellite communicator designed for two-way texting, location sharing, and SOS for backcountry travelers and remote workers in the US. This device aims to fill the communication gap where cellular service is unavailable, integrating with smartphones for seamless messaging while offering standalone functionality. The company positions the Messenger as an entry-level option in its ecosystem, reinforcing its focus on safety-oriented, higher-margin niches.

feed.title: Rio Tinto stock leans on its core mining assets.
feed.summary: Rio Tinto plc (ADR) is a global mining company with earnings primarily driven by iron ore, aluminum, copper, and other bulk commodities. Its diversified asset base, which includes large-scale mined commodities for various industrial demands, anchors its market story. For US investors, the ADR structure ensures visibility, with operational performance and commodity prices being key watchpoints.

feed.title: Form 4 Teradyne Inc For: 2 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article reports on a Form 4 filing for Teradyne Inc. on July 2nd. Form 4 filings are legally required documents that must be submitted to the SEC whenever there is a material change in the holdings of company insiders. The content of the filing specifies the changes in ownership of company stock by its officers, directors, and any beneficial owners of more than 10% of the company's stock.

feed.title: KEPCO rallies industry to commercialize direct current power systems
feed.summary: Korea Electric Power Corp. (KEPCO) has launched an initiative to accelerate the commercialization of direct current (DC) power systems, driven by the increasing electricity demands of AI data centers. KEPCO, alongside government officials, manufacturers, and researchers, held the "K-DC Industry Expansion 2026" event to transition from pilot projects to widespread industrial adoption of DC technologies across various sectors. The utility plans to expand its DC portfolio beyond high-voltage transmission to medium- and low-voltage distribution, establish a fast-track framework for new DC technologies, and promote large-scale projects with private sector investment.

feed.title: Director at Rectitude Holdings (RECT) granted 14,000 ordinary shares
feed.summary: Rectitude Holdings Ltd. director Ang Siew Sang received a grant of 14,000 ordinary shares on May 21, 2026, valued at $1.15 per share. This was a compensation-related acquisition and not an open-market transaction. Following this grant, Ang Siew Sang directly holds 14,000 ordinary shares.

feed.title: Boeing making progress in reducing Air Force One technical challenges, GAO says (BA:NYSE)
feed.summary: The Government Accountability Office (GAO) reported that Boeing has made progress in addressing technical challenges related to the new Air Force One jets. These challenges had previously caused delays in the delivery of the two aircraft. The report indicates a positive development in the program, as stated in the GAO's annual assessment of U.S. weapons programs.

feed.title: Pinnacle West Capital Corp stock hits all-time high at 108.45 USD
feed.summary: Pinnacle West Capital Corp (PNW) stock has reached an all-time high of $108.45, with impressive gains of 22.87% over six months and 19.85% over the past year. The company has consistently raised dividends for 14 consecutive years, although InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock might be overvalued. Recent news includes strong Q1 2026 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations, and the election of all ten director nominees during the annual meeting.

feed.title: HYCU® Positioned as a Visionary in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Backup and Data Protection Platforms for Fifth Consecutive Year
feed.summary: HYCU, Inc. has been recognized as a Visionary in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Backup and Data Protection Platforms for the fifth consecutive year. The company's HYCU R-Cloud Platform offers comprehensive data protection for various environments, including on-premises, cloud, SaaS, PaaS, and AI workloads, with a focus on customer-controlled storage. This recognition highlights HYCU's commitment to simplifying data protection and strengthening cyber resilience in an evolving technological landscape.

feed.title: American Eagle swipes Papa John’s CFO
feed.summary: American Eagle Outfitters has appointed Ravi Thanawala, formerly CFO of Papa John's International, as its new finance chief, effective August 3. Thanawala resigned from Papa John's after three years, where he also briefly served as interim CEO in 2024. He will receive a significant compensation package at AEO, while his predecessor, Michael Mathias, transitions to a strategic advisor role after six years as CFO.

feed.title: ExxonMobil donates $500,000 to American Red Cross for Venezuela earthquake relief
feed.summary: ExxonMobil has donated $500,000 to the American Red Cross to support relief efforts following earthquakes in Venezuela in June 2026. This funding will enable the Red Cross network to provide urgent humanitarian aid such as shelter, relief supplies, medical care, and family reunification services to affected communities. Alvin Abraham, global manager of corporate giving at ExxonMobil, expressed the company's solidarity and commitment to ensuring communities receive necessary care and resources.

feed.title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise outlines its hybrid cloud strategy as investors track infrastructure dema
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) is focusing on hybrid cloud and edge-to-cloud services to meet the growing demand for enterprise IT infrastructure. The company's strategy involves offering solutions that allow customers to operate workloads both in their own data centers and in external clouds, with an emphasis on consumption-based IT models. Investors are closely watching HPE's recurring revenue growth and the successful implementation of its hybrid cloud and edge strategies.

feed.title: Aptiv plc focuses on advanced vehicle technology as investors watch long term trends
feed.summary: Aptiv plc, a global technology company, is developing advanced automotive electronics and software for global manufacturers. The company's strategic focus is on supporting the long-term growth of connected and electric vehicles by providing hardware and software for advanced safety systems, connectivity, and electrification. Investors are closely watching how Aptiv's technology portfolio aligns with the increasing demand for advanced driver assistance systems, electric vehicles, and higher electronic content per vehicle.

feed.title: Walmart Inc Stock (WMT) Moved Up by 3.15% on Jul 2: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Walmart Inc (WMT) stock rose by 3.15% on July 2nd, driven by a rebound from oversold conditions, institutional dip-buying, and macroeconomic data easing fears of further Federal Reserve rate hikes. The positive movement occurred despite a previous sell-off caused by inventory concerns, with investors now focusing on Walmart's high-margin growth initiatives and market dominance. While technical indicators suggest a sell condition, fundamental analysis places Walmart as a top performer in its industry, although risks like slowing domestic sales and elevated valuation multiples remain.

feed.title: KKR to buy EDF power solution’s North American operations for $4.2B
feed.summary: KKR announced its acquisition of EDF power solutions' North American operations for $4.2 billion, with potential additional payments. The deal includes EDF's solar, wind, and battery storage assets across the U.S. and Canada, aimed at supporting the United States' energy security and affordability goals amid rising electricity demand. KKR plans to expand EDF's asset base and accelerate its development pipeline.

feed.title: Ge Vernova Inc Stock (GEV) Moved Down by 3.68% on Jul 2: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Ge Vernova Inc (GEV) shares experienced a 3.68% decline on July 2nd, attributed to profit-taking after a significant rally and the conclusion of index-driven institutional buying. The stock's premium valuation, trading at over sixty times forward earnings, made it susceptible to downward pressure. Furthermore, operational risks like grid bottlenecks, regulatory challenges, and persistent losses in its Wind segment contribute to investor concerns regarding future execution and margin expansion.

feed.title: PSEG chair, president and CEO LaRossa sells $167,704 of common stock
feed.summary: Ralph A. LaRossa, Chairman, President, and CEO of Public Service Enterprise Group Inc. (NASDAQ:PEG), sold 2,083 shares of the company's common stock for a total of $167,704 on July 1, 2026. This transaction occurred as PEG stock trades near its 52-week low, despite the company reporting strong first-quarter 2026 financial results that surpassed earnings and revenue forecasts. LaRossa now directly holds 285,148.9713 shares of PSEG common stock.

feed.title: Trending Industry Today: KLA Corp Leads Losses In Solar Power Stocks
feed.summary: The article reports that KLA Corp (KLAC) is leading losses among solar power stocks today. This indicates a negative trend for the company within the solar industry.

feed.title: Top Momentum Stocks to Watch: Centene Corporation (CNC) Leads with Strong RSI
feed.summary: Centene Corporation (CNC) is highlighted as a top momentum stock with a strong Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 67 and a high Quant rating of 4.94, despite historical trends suggesting July can be challenging for momentum stocks. The company, a significant player in the managed healthcare sector with a $33.75 billion market cap, has a GF Score™ of 74, indicating solid performance, particularly in profitability. However, investors are advised to exercise caution due to a low growth rank and significant insider selling, totaling $5.2 million over the past three months.

feed.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Rating Upgraded by Guggenheim to Buy from Neutral
feed.summary: Guggenheim has upgraded its rating on ServiceNow (NOW) to Buy from Neutral, setting a price target of $125, citing an attractive opportunity for a profitably growing firm. Concurrently, Evercore ISI maintained its Outperform rating with a $150 price target, emphasizing the need for ServiceNow to demonstrate consistent execution on its AI strategy. ServiceNow also recently partnered with Accenture to launch managed security services built on the ServiceNow AI Platform, aiming to enhance cyber resilience.

feed.title: Home Depot’s Comps Just Turned Positive for the First Time in 2 Years. Is the Housing Recovery Finally Here?
feed.summary: Home Depot reported its first positive comparable sales growth in two years during Q1 FY2026, with U.S. comps up 0.4%. While this signals a potential turn, the housing market remains a constraint, with large discretionary projects still deferred. Analysts and TIKR's model project a gradual recovery for Home Depot, aligning with an anticipated normalization of housing turnover and easing mortgage rates, suggesting long-term upside for the stock.

feed.title: Ivana Delevska's Top Picks: Astera Labs, KLA Corp & Cloudflare
feed.summary: Ivana Delevska, founder and CIO of SPEAR Invest, has shared her top stock picks for the market, which include Astera Labs, KLA Corp, and Cloudflare. This segment is part of BNN Bloomberg's "Market Call" and details her current investment selections.

feed.title: PEG (NYSE: PEG) CEO sells 2,083 shares, retains 285,148.97

The shares were sold at a weighted average price of $80.5109. Following this transaction, LaRossa directly holds 285,148.9713 shares of the company.

feed.summary: This article lists nine consumer discretionary stocks showing significant movement during Thursday's intraday trading session. It highlights both gainers like Polibeli Group, Culp, YSX Tech Co, and LightInTheBox Holding, and losers such as 707 Cayman Holdings, Fort Technology, Uxin, Autozi Internet Tech, and RedCloud Holdings, noting their respective percentage changes and market capitalization. The movements are attributed to various factors, including recent earnings reports for some companies.

feed.title: Regional Management stock steadies on financing focus
feed.summary: Regional Management Corp (RM) continues to focus on its consumer lending model, specializing in small installment loans for near-prime borrowers. The company's performance is closely tied to funding costs, credit quality, and borrower demand, which are key factors for investors. Reviewed on July 2, 2026, the company's shares trade on the Nasdaq, with its business model and the broader US small-cap credit market serving as primary anchors for analysis.

feed.title: Form 4 Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corp For: 2 July By Investing.com

The article includes the stock symbol WAB and mentions a slight dip in its price.

feed.title: NNN stock holds steady. Focus turns to the REIT's portfolio.
feed.summary: NNN REIT Inc. operates a net-lease real estate investment trust focused on free-standing retail properties with long-term leases, providing stable income. The company's performance relies on recurring rental income, lease renewals, tenant quality, and acquisition discipline, rather than product cycles. Investors track its balance sheet, funding costs, and cash yield, with the core question being its ability to maintain stable cash flow amid changing economic conditions.

feed.title: Behind the bucket: How KFC cooked up its new brand experience
feed.summary: KFC collaborated with global branding agency JKR to redefine its brand experience, building on its iconic assets like Colonel Sanders and the distinctive bucket. The evolution involved giving each brand element a clearer role, introducing new colors, and making the experience more modern and culturally connected, aiming for "quality experience restaurants" (QXR). The successful update, which involved global market input, has been well-received by customers, maintaining familiarity while injecting new energy.

feed.title: State Street Secures ETF SPYM as the Default Vehicle for the New U.S. Children’s Investment Program
feed.summary: State Street Investment Management's SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 ETF (SPYM) has been chosen as the exclusive default investment vehicle for the new "Trump Accounts," a U.S. national savings program for minors. This initiative, launching July 4, 2026, aims to promote long-term investment from an early age through tax-advantaged accounts, with an initial government contribution of $1,000 for eligible children and additional supplementary contributions. State Street highlights the ETF's low cost and diversified exposure to the S&P 500 index as key benefits for small savers.

feed.title: Dow Hits Records, Nasdaq 100 Tumbles On Chip Rout - State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (ARCA:SPY), Inves
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average reached a new record high due to a weaker-than-expected June jobs report, easing concerns about interest rate hikes. However, the rally was not broad, with the Nasdaq 100 tumbling significantly as semiconductor stocks experienced a brutal selloff. Gold and silver prices rose, while crude oil eased and Bitcoin saw a modest gain.

feed.title: Christopher C. Gibson lists multiple Class A sales (RXRX)
feed.summary: Christopher C. Gibson, an insider at Recursion Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (RXRX), has filed a Form 144 notice for proposed sales of Class A common stock. The filing details several disposition dates and share quantities, including a significant 100,000 share entry dated July 1, 2026, and a 340,440 share entry from June 18, 2026. These are proposed transactions rather than completed sales.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust focuses on Sun Belt rental demand as investors watch U.S. housing trends
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust is strategically focusing on multifamily rental communities in the U.S. Sun Belt region, leveraging strong employment growth and population trends. The company aims for stable occupancy and competitive rental rates through well-maintained properties and disciplined financial management. This approach positions the REIT to cater to long-term demand in high-growth metropolitan areas, offering investors recurring income and exposure to dynamic U.S. housing fundamentals.

feed.title: F5 stock stays tied to its software platform. Investors wait for the next signal.
feed.summary: F5 Inc. (FFIV) maintains its focus on application delivery and security software, with its stock trading on Nasdaq. The company's business is centered on providing software and services for enterprises to secure and manage application traffic across hybrid and multi-cloud environments. Given the absence of new catalysts, investors are looking for signals from company filings, customer updates, or fresh analyst notes regarding its installed base, recurring software revenue, and enterprise refresh cycles.

feed.title: KeyCorp highlights regional banking role amid evolving US credit cycle
feed.summary: KeyCorp outlines its role as a significant regional bank in the U.S., emphasizing its focus on commercial lending, digital banking, and risk management within an evolving credit cycle. The bank operates under the KeyBank brand, serving retail, small business, and commercial clients, with activities closely tied to U.S. interest rates and economic conditions. Its strategy balances retail stability with corporate lending opportunities, managing credit risk, and adapting to regulatory frameworks.

feed.title: Williams Cos. stock. Company profile drives the update
feed.summary: This article focuses on Williams Cos. (WMB) and its core business of natural gas infrastructure. The company's stock performance is linked to the scale of its pipeline and midstream footprint and its U.S. listing, making it a key focus for domestic energy investors. The business model emphasizes cash generation from contract structure, volumes, and asset utilization rather than commodity price swings.

feed.title: Is McKesson (MCK) Undervalued On Softer Results And New Partnerships?
feed.summary: McKesson (MCK) has experienced mixed share price performance recently, with a 2.09% decline but a 4.52% one-month gain, amidst softer quarterly results and its inclusion in Russell 1000 defensive indexes. The company is considered undervalued by a widely followed narrative, trading at $768.06 against a fair value of $941.40, driven by increased adoption of specialty pharmaceuticals and strategic acquisitions positioning it for higher operating margins. While an earnings-based view suggests a significant valuation gap, potential risks such as regulatory pressure on drug pricing or vertical integration in the pharmaceutical supply chain could impact its future.

feed.title: West completes sale of on-body drug delivery device to AbbVie
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services announced the completion of the sale of its SmartDose 3.5mL on-body delivery system, including manufacturing and supply rights, to AbbVie. The transaction, agreed upon in January, involved a total consideration of $112.5 million. West will continue to develop and manufacture other SmartDose versions.

feed.title: SWK stock holds its ground. Stanley Black & Decker leans on tools and efficiency.
feed.summary: Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) stock is currently shaped by the company's focus on its tools business and efforts to improve profit margins. Operating performance is tied to repair, renovation, and construction spending, making demand and pricing crucial. The company's strategy involves balancing these factors with cost discipline to boost earnings power in a market that values clear cost control and steady cash generation from industrial firms.

feed.title: Phantom stock grant lifts Union Pacific (UNP) director holdings to 338 units
feed.summary: Union Pacific director Will W. Anthony was granted 159 Phantom Stock units, increasing his total holdings to 338 units. These units, referenced at $277.73 each, are linked to Union Pacific common stock but are payable only in cash upon retirement, categorizing them as equity-linked compensation rather than stock ownership. This transaction is considered neutral in terms of filing impact and sentiment, representing a form of compensation without directly affecting share dilution.

feed.title: Norton 360 Deluxe from Gen Digital Inc. - subscription security that follows US users across devices
feed.summary: The article details Norton 360 Deluxe, a subscription-based security suite from Gen Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: GEN) that offers multi-device protection, VPN, and dark web monitoring for US households. It highlights the product's features, pricing model, performance, and its competitive position in the consumer cybersecurity market. The suite is a key component of Gen Digital's strategy for recurring revenue and brand visibility, catering to the increasing need for comprehensive household device coverage.

feed.title: RGC Resources VP Miles Christen Brooke purchases $149 of common stock
feed.summary: Miles Christen Brooke, VP of Human Resources at RGC Resources Inc. (NASDAQ:RGCO), recently purchased 6.18 shares of company stock for approximately $149 through a dividend reinvestment plan. Following this transaction, Brooke directly holds 9,833.527 shares and 5,000 employee stock options. The company also announced strong Q2 fiscal 2026 results, surpassing analyst expectations for EPS and revenue, and declared its 329th consecutive quarterly cash dividend.

feed.title: PRT stock edges into view. Permianville Royalty keeps its income model
feed.summary: Permianville Royalty Trust (PRT) is a Nasdaq-listed entity whose business model is centered on mineral and royalty interests, making its income dependent on oil and gas production and commodity pricing. The company operates as a cash-yield vehicle rather than a growth stock, with its distributions fluctuating based on these external factors. Despite a lack of recent live catalysts, the stock's story is defined by its royalty exposure, market listing, and sensitivity to cash flow.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics adds RENN Fund (RCG) shares in open-market buy
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a significant owner of RENN Fund, Inc. (RCG), reported an open-market purchase of 756 shares at $3.09 per share. This transaction increased its direct holdings to 928,884 shares. Horizon Kinetics serves as RENN Fund's investment adviser and holds a pecuniary interest through various managed accounts.
